step_rationale: Endothelial lipolysis platform; regulates local triglyceride hydrolysis and remnant lipoprotein handling.
mechanism: GPIHBP1 anchors lipoprotein lipase at the endothelial surface, regulating triglyceride-rich lipoprotein clearance and lipid substrate retention.

references.title: Lipoprotein size and susceptibility to atherosclerosis--insights from genetically modified mouse models.
